description_long: This bungalow features a modern, open-plan layout with a mix of indoor and outdoor living spaces. The structure is predominantly white with flat roofs, large windows, and a spacious patio area that includes a pergola and a swimming pool. The main entrance leads into a central living area, surrounded by multiple rooms including bedrooms, bathrooms, and a kitchen. The rear of the bungalow opens to a private backyard with a wooden deck and landscaped green areas. The design emphasizes clean lines, minimal ornamentation, and functional outdoor amenities. The use of glass, concrete, and wood elements is evident throughout the exterior and likely the interior.
description: A modern, single-story bungalow with flat roofs, large windows, a patio, pergola, and swimming pool, featuring clean lines and open living spaces.
description_view_0: Front view showing the main entrance, central living area, and a large tiled patio.
description_view_1: Side view highlighting the elongated layout, visible bedrooms, and the swimming pool at the rear.
description_view_2: Rear view displaying the backyard, wooden deck, pergola, and pool area.
description_view_3: Opposite side view with clear sight of the green areas, patio, and multiple room windows.
attribute_window_arrangement: asymmetrical with large grouped windows and sliding glass doors
